reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify the drummer connected with Judas Priest before the Angel of Retribution return.
2. Determine the year that drummer was born and return the year.
original_final_question: In what year was the drummer from the album "Angel of Retribution" born? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which drummer is named in connection with Judas Priest before the Angel of Retribution return? Evidence: Painkiller (Judas Priest album): It is the last Judas Priest album to feature lead singer Rob Halford until his return for the 2005 album "Angel of Retribution" and the first to feature drummer Scott Travis. -> Scott Travis

Node 2: In what year was that drummer born? Evidence: Scott Travis: Mark Scott Travis (born September 6, 1961) is a Grammy Award-winning American rock musician, best known as the drummer for the English heavy metal band Judas Priest and the American heavy metal band Racer X. -> 1961
